[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000010 1
1 10110001 4
2 11111101 7
3 10000111 4
4 01101101 5
5 00001001 2
6 01101101 5
7 00000000 a

01 10 00000001 1

67 76 10000110 3
70 07 00000000 a match 7

71 17 10000000 1

72 27 00000100 1

37 73 00000000 a match 7
